title: oxyanthus speciosus subsp. mollis
intro: Oxyanthus speciosus subsp. mollis, also known as the Velvet Bushwillow, is a plant species native to Southern Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Velvet Bushwillow include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using Velvet Bushwillow include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Velvet Bushwillow typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or ointments.
